title: Home Left And Right Tipper Axes Using AUTO REF
summary: Home the left and right tipper axes at the operator station using AUTO REF for the documented axes Z1, A1, Z2, and A2, and verify the HMI motion indication and stop-at-home behavior described in the manual.
when_to_use: Use during operator station startup or whenever the documented source procedure requires homing the left and right tipper axes using AUTO REF.
not_for: Do not use for undocumented axis-specific fault handling or troubleshooting when an axis does not move, does not change color, or does not stop at home.
Do not use as a manual jogging or manual referencing procedure.

responsibilities: Identify the documented tipper axes to be homed.
Press AUTO REF on the operator station controls/HMI.
Observe axis button color change during motion.
Confirm the tipper motor stops after sensing the home proximity switch.
Verify all documented axes are homed before proceeding.

safety_notes: Use only the documented AUTO REF homing action from the source.
The source does not provide additional troubleshooting if an axis does not move, does not change color, or does not stop at home.
Do not infer undocumented controls, thresholds, or recovery actions.
access_or_tools_needed: Operator station HMI or controls with AUTO REF
Ability to observe axis button color indication

access_required: Access to the operator station HMI or controls with AUTO REF
system_preconditions: The procedure is performed in the operator station startup context described by the source.
The axes to be homed are the documented tipper axes: Z1 and A1 for the left tipper, and Z2 and A2 for the right tipper.

visual_references.description: System/operator station screen artifact associated with startup context including AUTO REF homing of Z1, A1, Z2, and A2.
Operator station control panel reference showing the primary HMI/control context for tipper operation controls.
Operator station HMI screen showing axis controls for Z1, A1, Z2, and A2; useful to identify the documented axes on screen.
Operator station HMI screen associated with referencing axes during maintenance; useful as a visual reference for referencing-related controls.
Operator station HMI artifact associated with manually referencing tipper axes during maintenance; supplemental visual context.

steps.title: Identify the documented tipper axes to home
steps.purpose: Ensure the operator homes only the axes explicitly identified by the source.
steps.instruction: Identify the documented axes to be homed: Z1 and A1 for the left tipper, and Z2 and A2 for the right tipper.
steps.expected_result: The operator has identified all four documented axes that must be homed.
steps.healthy_condition: Z1 and A1 are recognized as the left tipper axes, and Z2 and A2 are recognized as the right tipper axes.
steps.failure_condition: The required axes are not identified or the operator is unsure which axes are included in the homing action.

actions.label: Identify homing axes
actions.exact_action: Identify the documented axes to be homed: Z1 and A1 for the left tipper, and Z2 and A2 for the right tipper.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the axis labels Z1 AXIS, A1 AXIS, Z2 AXIS, and A2 AXIS on the operator station screen.
Look for the startup/operator station context where AUTO REF homing of the documented axes is described.

stop_or_escalate_if: The documented axes cannot be identified from the available HMI/control context.
The operator is uncertain whether the selected axes are Z1, A1, Z2, and A2.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: "Home" every axis: Z1 and A1 (left tipper) and Z2 and A2 (right tipper). Press AUTO REF.

steps.title: Press AUTO REF
steps.purpose: Initiate the documented automatic homing action for the tipper axes.
steps.expected_result: The automatic homing action begins for the documented tipper axes.
steps.healthy_condition: AUTO REF is initiated for the documented axes.
steps.failure_condition: AUTO REF is not initiated or no homing action begins.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the startup/operator station screen context where AUTO REF is used to home the axes.
Look at the operator station control panel context for the main HMI/control layout.

stop_or_escalate_if: AUTO REF cannot be located on the operator station controls/HMI.
Pressing AUTO REF does not appear to initiate homing behavior.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: "Home" every axis: Z1 and A1 (left tipper) and Z2 and A2 (right tipper). Press AUTO REF.

steps.title: Observe axis motion indication on the HMI
steps.purpose: Verify the source-defined visual indication that an axis is moving during homing.
steps.instruction: Observe the axis button change from green to yellow to indicate the axis is moving.
steps.expected_result: The axis button changes from green to yellow while the axis is moving.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI shows the documented green-to-yellow color change during axis movement.
steps.failure_condition: The axis button does not change from green to yellow, or movement indication is not observable.

actions.label: Verify color change during motion
actions.exact_action: Observe the axis button change from green to yellow to indicate the axis is moving.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look at the operator station HMI screen for the axis buttons associated with Z1, A1, Z2, and A2.
Look at the primary operator HMI/control panel context for active control indications.
Use as supplemental reference for referencing-related HMI screen context.
Use as supplemental reference for referencing-related HMI screen context.

stop_or_escalate_if: The axis button does not change from green to yellow.
Axis movement cannot be confirmed from the HMI indication.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The axis button changes from green to yellow to indicate it is moving. The tipper motor moves until it senses the "home" proximity switch, then stops.

steps.title: Allow the tipper motor to move to home and stop
steps.purpose: Verify the source-defined homing completion behavior at the home proximity switch.
steps.instruction: Allow the tipper motor to move until it senses the home proximity switch and stops.
steps.expected_result: The tipper motor moves to the home position and stops after sensing the home proximity switch.
steps.healthy_condition: The motor stops after sensing the home proximity switch.
steps.failure_condition: The motor does not move to home or does not stop after sensing the home proximity switch.

actions.label: Observe stop-at-home behavior
actions.exact_action: Allow the tipper motor to move until it senses the home proximity switch and stops.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Look for the startup context describing homing completion behavior.
Use as component reference for tipper axis/motor context while observing homing behavior.

stop_or_escalate_if: The tipper motor does not move.
The tipper motor does not stop at the home proximity switch.
Observed behavior differs from the documented stop-at-home behavior.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The axis button changes from green to yellow to indicate it is moving. The tipper motor moves until it senses the "home" proximity switch, then stops.

steps.title: Confirm all documented axes are homed
steps.purpose: Ensure the full documented homing scope is complete before proceeding.
steps.instruction: Confirm every documented axis has been homed before proceeding.
steps.expected_result: All four documented axes have been homed.
steps.healthy_condition: Z1, A1, Z2, and A2 have all completed the documented homing behavior.
steps.failure_condition: One or more documented axes have not been confirmed as homed.

actions.label: Confirm homing completion
actions.exact_action: Confirm every documented axis has been homed before proceeding.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Verify all documented axis controls are accounted for on the operator station screen.
Use the startup context artifact to confirm the full set of axes that must be homed.

stop_or_escalate_if: Any of Z1, A1, Z2, or A2 cannot be confirmed as homed.
The operator cannot verify completion for every documented axis.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: "Home" every axis: Z1 and A1 (left tipper) and Z2 and A2 (right tipper). Press AUTO REF.
The axis button changes from green to yellow to indicate it is moving. The tipper motor moves until it senses the "home" proximity switch, then stops.

success_criteria: The left tipper axes Z1 and A1 are homed.
The right tipper axes Z2 and A2 are homed.
The HMI shows the documented green-to-yellow motion indication during movement.
The tipper motor stops after sensing the home proximity switch.
Every documented axis has been confirmed as homed before proceeding.
healthy_conditions: Axis buttons change from green to yellow while the axes are moving.
The tipper motor moves until it senses the home proximity switch and then stops.
All documented axes Z1, A1, Z2, and A2 are confirmed homed.
failure_conditions: An axis does not move during AUTO REF.
An axis button does not change from green to yellow during movement.
The tipper motor does not stop at the home proximity switch.
One or more documented axes cannot be confirmed as homed.
The source provides no additional troubleshooting for these failure cases.
escalation_guidance: Escalate for SME or maintenance review if an axis does not move, does not change color, or does not stop at home, because the source does not provide additional troubleshooting.
Do not infer undocumented axis-specific fault handling or recovery actions.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Startup/operator station context including AUTO REF homing of Z1, A1, Z2, and A2.
Primary operator station control panel/HMI context.
Axis labels and operator station screen context for Z1, A1, Z2, and A2.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: "Home" every axis: Z1 and A1 (left tipper) and Z2 and A2 (right tipper). Press AUTO REF.
The axis button changes from green to yellow to indicate it is moving. The tipper motor moves until it senses the "home" proximity switch, then stops.

missing_details: The source does not provide a time estimate for this procedure.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required for this homing action.
The source does not provide detailed screen layout or per-axis button locations for AUTO REF homing.
The source does not provide additional troubleshooting if an axis does not move, does not change color, or does not stop at home.
The source does not provide explicit completion indicators beyond motion color change and stop-at-home behavior.
